training_status: strength training 3-4 times per week, no cardio

benefits.description: Body recomposition with fat loss while maintaining/gaining some muscle definition

protocol_notes: OP claims use of Retatrutide only but multiple commenters dispute this and suggest additional compounds (testosterone, HGH, Tesamorelin). OP denies steroid use and claims peptides only. Diet: sweet potato, 93% lean ground beef, chicken breast, eggs, avocado. High protein, very low carbs and fat. Started at 286 lbs, previously at 220 lbs shredded 3 years ago.
